title: MoreCommonOres+
description: This mod makes Iron, Copper and Gold ores generate more  commonly in your minecraft world.
body:
# What does this mod do?

**This mod enhances ore generation by increasing the spawn rates of iron, copper, and gold ores during world generation. In the version ending with 'd', diamonds are also included in this list. This way, you can find resources more easily while keeping the game balanced.**

# Example
![Image of a cave with this mod. The crying obsidians represent the ores generated by this mod, but they are changed to crying obsidian just for this picture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9a2fb63a7f27195458d4b5ff3323d974f357f0b.png)

**This is a screenshot of a cave generated with this mod on. I have changed the Iron, Gold and Copper ores that the mod generates to Crying Obsidian for better visblity.**
